title: OpenClaw Sub Agents and ACPX (OpenClaw Business Automation Setup)
summary: Jordan Urbs demonstrates multi-agent orchestration using OpenClaw and Claude Code, with sub-agents deployed into specialized workspaces. The setup uses GitHub repositories as a communication layer, markdown-based knowledge bases for agent context, and agentic harnesses to coordinate task execution across multiple agents on commodity hardware.
